blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,583 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 12".
